ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 41-42 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.) For a reference to Alfano`s academic nickname see Antonio Filoteo degli Oddi, La Descrittione Latina Del Sito Di Mongibello, Palermo, de Franceschi, 1611, p. 80, (British Library Shelfmark: 233.e.23.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
